description_long: This bungalow complex features a series of single-story units arranged in a linear fashion, each with a prominent hip roof and separated by landscaped walkways. The central axis leads to a rectangular swimming pool at one end, surrounded by palm trees and lush vegetation. The exterior walls are finished in a combination of brick and wood paneling, with large windows and doors opening onto private patios. The property is bordered by rows of flowering trees, providing privacy and a vibrant, natural aesthetic. The main entrance is marked by a covered porch area, and the overall layout emphasizes symmetry and accessibility. The design is modern yet incorporates traditional bungalow elements, making it suitable for upscale residential neighborhoods.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow complex with hip roofs, landscaped walkways, and a central swimming pool, surrounded by flowering trees and private patios.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, covered porch, and symmetrical arrangement of bungalow units with landscaped walkways and trees.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the row of hip-roofed units, extensive tree border, and the linear layout of the complex.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the swimming pool, palm trees, and private patios opening from the bungalow units.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displaying the full length of the complex, tree-lined perimeter, and the arrangement of individual units.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical front-facing windows with grouped side windows
